Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 30% damage to all enemies.
Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 40% damage to all enemies.
Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 50% damage to all enemies.
Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 50% damage to all enemies, with an additional 20% damage to the front row.
Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 60% damage to all enemies, with an additional 20% damage to the front row.
Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 70% damage to all enemies, with an additional 20% damage to the front row.
Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 70% damage to all enemies, with an additional 20% damage to the front row and 15% to the last 2 rows.
Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 80% damage to all enemies, with an additional 20% damage to the front row and 15% to the last 2 rows.
Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 90% damage to all enemies, with an additional 20% damage to the front row and 15% to the last 2 rows.

Every 8 turns, the Behemoth fires its laser cannon, dealing 90% damage to all enemies, with an additional 20% damage to the front row and 15% to the last 2 rows. This skill has a 20% chance of being released twice.

The Behemoth helps intercept enemy missiles, reducing damage taken by all allies by 3% at the start of battle. The effect decreases by 0.5% each turn.
The Behemoth helps intercept enemy missiles, reducing damage taken by all allies by 4% at the start of battle. The effect decreases by 0.5% each turn.
The Behemoth helps intercept enemy missiles, reducing damage taken by all allies by 5% at the start of battle. The effect decreases by 0.5% each turn.
The Behemoth helps intercept enemy missiles, reducing damage taken by all allies by 5% at the start of battle. The effect decreases by 0.5% each turn, with friendly Hunters losing 0.25% instead.
The Behemoth helps intercept enemy missiles, reducing damage taken by all allies by 6% at the start of battle. The effect decreases by 0.5% each turn, with friendly Hunters losing 0.25% instead.
